docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOODS, PHILLIP AS TO DEFENDANT SHAFTON, SARAH

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SARAH SHAFTON SET FOR FEB-24-2015 IS CONTINUED TO APR-07-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN 506. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY ZOE GARVIN--FRIEND AND CARE MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: QUEENA C. HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOODS, PHILLIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAFTON, SARAH $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-07-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE(S). PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
